title: EverChristmas
description: A frozen overworld locked in an endless Christmas Eve. Villages are fully decorated, holiday trees spawn inside villager homes, and Santa flies overhead every eight days to judge your kindness or mischief — leaving presents based on how you’ve behaved.
body: Experience an overworld trapped in an endless Christmas Eve, where snow blankets every biome and villages glow with festive lights. A new morality bar appears above your hunger, tracking how many ‘Santas’ or ‘Grinches’ you’ve earned. Your choices shape the gifts you receive when Santa soars across the sky every eight days, his voice echoing for twenty-five seconds even if you never manage to spot him. Holiday trees and presents appear inside villager homes, and stealing them marks you as a true Grinch, unlocking a special advancement and draining your morality. Every action pushes you toward kindness or mischief in this magical, frozen world.
